# Shadow Guild LLM Catalog

Shadow Guild is a categorized catalog of agents, skills, prompts, and workflows.

Primary source of truth:
- inventory/registry.json

Core commands:
- node scripts/install.mjs list
- node scripts/install.mjs install --class ai-research --dry-run
- node scripts/install.mjs install --bundle design-engineering-pro --dry-run

Key docs:
- README.md
- CATALOG.md
